name: Bacon and Smoked Oysters
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bacon strips into thirds.
2. Wrap a bacon slice around each oyster and secure in place with a toothpick.
3. Heat oil in a medium skillet over medium heat.
4. Add garlic to the hot oil.
5. Carefully lower wrapped oysters into the pan, ensuring they are fully covered by oil.
6. Cook until the bacon is crisp, about 10-12 minutes total.
7. Remove the cooked oysters from the pan using tongs and let them drain on a paper towel-lined plate.
Serves 15
